name: source_thread_snapshot_id
description: Current source-thread content version ID used for extraction.

name: passage_text
description: Exact source passage used as evidence.

name: passage_score
description: Provider-visible score for the passage node.

name: thread_score
description: Provider-visible score for the source thread.

name: thread_comment_count
description: Provider-visible comment count for the source thread.

name: active
description: Whether this passage belongs to the active Thread Extraction Run for the Source Thread.
